arts.ttl: Report confirms Liverpool offer for 26-year-old ace Slot tried to sign for Feyenoord
arts.sum: Liverpool have reportedly submitted an offer to sign the Bologna defender Sam Beukema. According to a report from 1000 Cuori Rossoblu, Liverpool have had their offer rejected for the 26-year-old Dutch defender. Arne Slot knows the player well having tried to sign him during his time at Feyenoord.
